description: Deterministic artifact contract for source-backed PP&D guidance page change reports.

artifact_rules.intended_storage: ppd/tests/fixtures/source-diff-reports/ for curated fixtures; ppd/data/manifests/ for later reviewed public crawl outputs

field_definitions.source_scope: Bounded source category, seed set, and compliance notes.
field_definitions.changed_pages: Pages whose normalized public guidance content changed.
field_definitions.removed_pages: Previously tracked public guidance pages no longer present or no longer in scope.
field_definitions.unchanged_pages: Tracked pages with unchanged normalized content hashes.
field_definitions.validation: Deterministic fixture and policy checks that can run without network access.

validation_expectations: Every changed page has HTTPS canonical_url.
Every changed page has at least one evidence item.
Every diff hunk has a non-empty requirement_impact.
Consequential changes are flagged for human review before guardrail promotion.
Fixtures contain no credentials, user project facts, private session state, raw traces, screenshots, or downloaded documents.
